test.create_query: CREATE TABLE jks_perf_left ( high_card UInt64 STATISTICS(uniq), low_card UInt64 STATISTICS(uniq), payload UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY low_card
CREATE TABLE jks_perf_right ( high_card UInt64 STATISTICS(uniq), low_card UInt64 STATISTICS(uniq), extra UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY high_card
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO jks_perf_left SELECT number, intDiv(number, 10), number FROM numbers(10000000)
INSERT INTO jks_perf_right SELECT number, intDiv(number, 10), number FROM numbers(10000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM jks_perf_left l JOIN jks_perf_right r ON l.high_card = r.high_card AND l.low_card = r.low_card SETTINGS query_plan_hash_join_subset_keys_auto = 1 FORMAT Null
